# Product Weights logistics UoM

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:1f55d8303a441bfc4c7030e3e71682f00e82207a3fa4fa28d2cf47fde0121451

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Allows to calculate products weight from its components when
differents weights uom are used.

Example:
Bread (kg) = salt (g) + flour (kg) + water (kg)

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

See parent module product_logistics_uom.
